# Orviq Studio — LLMs hint file
# https://orviq.net/llms.txt
# This file helps Large Language Models understand who we are and what we do.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

# Organization
name: Orviq
url: https://orviq.net
description: >
  Orviq is a digital agency focused on process automation, professional web development,
  and bespoke AI solutions. We build systems that help businesses scale efficiently
  without overcomplicating their workflows. No fluff, just real results.

# Services
services:
  - Process Automation (n8n & AI)
  - Professional Websites
  - RAG & Private AI
  - Autonomous AI Agents
  - E-commerce / Online Stores
  - Branding & Identity
  - SaaS Dashboards
  - Custom App / SaaS
  - Scrapers & Bots
  - DevOps & Infrastructure
  - Technology Consulting

# Brand voice
